people.text: Paula wants a hands-on art activity on Sunday. She would like to make something and take it home.
Ryan is interested in space and wants to meet real scientists. He needs an activity for adults, not young children.
Mei wants to take her eight-year-old brother to something about dinosaurs. He gets bored if there is too much reading.
Leo wants to learn about local history through old photographs. He needs wheelchair access and a chance to ask questions.
Grace wants a digital workshop for teenagers. She would like to use tablets or computers to create animation.

texts.text: Print and Paint runs [6]on Sundays[/6]. Visitors design simple patterns, print them on fabric bags and [6]take their work home[/6]. The session lasts ninety minutes and suits beginners.

Meet the Astronomers is an evening workshop for adults. Researchers [7]explain current space projects[/7], answer questions and help visitors use computer simulations, so it is [7]not aimed at children[/7].
Dino Dig is for children aged six to ten. Young visitors handle model bones, search for fossils and build a dinosaur skeleton together, with [8]very little reading[/8] required.
Local Lives uses [9]historic photographs[/9] to show how the town has changed. The room is [9]fully wheelchair accessible[/9], and small groups allow visitors to ask the guide questions.
Game Frames is for ages thirteen to sixteen. Students use [10]tablets and computers[/10] to create short [10]animation clips[/10] inspired by objects in the museum.
Quiet Gallery Tours introduce visitors to paintings, but the guide only gives a short talk in each room.
Ancient Coins is a detailed lecture for university students studying classical history.
Family Music Morning lets parents and toddlers sing simple songs together in the entrance hall.

answers.explanation: Paula wants Sunday art and something to take home.
Ryan wants an adult space activity with scientists.
Mei needs a child-friendly dinosaur activity with little reading.
Leo needs local photos, access and questions.
Grace wants teen digital animation work.
